docs.title: Project Organization
docs.text:
3rdparty/        # third party dependencies
build-scripts/   # build utility scripts
cmake/           # cmake specific files
docs/            # documentation
game/            # source files for maze
sponge/          # source files for sponge game engine

docs.title: Installing
docs.text:
Clone this repository.

git clone https://github.com/tomconder/maze.git

Install Conan, a dependency and package manager for C++. If you have Python installed, use pip to install conan.

pip install conan
